tasks.description: Analyze the strengths and weaknesses of the current portfolio using comprehensive risk-return and exposure analytics.

subtasks.description: Call calculate_portfolio_performance to summarize overall risk-adjusted returns and volatility for the user's portfolio.
Call calculate_ticker_performances to derive individual ticker Sharpe, Sortino, Alpha, and other risk-adjusted metrics.
Call calculate_portfolio_correlation_matrix to identify high pairwise correlations among holdings.
Call calculate_group_performances to analyze industry/sub-industry level concentration and risk.
Call portfolio_exposure_calculator to determine net, gross, long, and short exposures.
Call portfolio_stress_test to evaluate portfolio resilience under extreme scenarios.
Call calculate_portfolio_beta_vs_index to assess systematic risk (beta) versus SPY benchmark.
Call calculate_portfolio_factor_tilts to review style exposures (value, growth, etc.).

tasks.description: Synthesize analytics to definitively identify strong and weak positions in the portfolio.

subtasks.description: Aggregate evidence from analytics to select strong (keep) and weak (replace/adjust) tickers and rationale.

tasks.description: Screen for quality replacement candidates and diversification opportunities using the stock_screener tool.

subtasks.description: Use stock_screener to target strong stocks (factor: value/growth/quality/low beta/other) based on identified weaknesses (run at least three distinct screens).
Use stock_screener to screen for high-quality, low-correlation ETFs as candidate additions.

tasks.description: Construct the new optimized portfolio and log it to episodic memory.

subtasks.description: Assemble the optimized portfolio, specifying allocations, removals, additions, and adjustments according to analysis findings. Define detailed rationale for each action.
Call episodic_remember to store the new portfolio composition and optimization logic to memory.

tasks.description: Perform iterative, data-driven refinement and validation of new portfolio.

subtasks.description: Call calculate_portfolio_performance, calculate_ticker_performances, calculate_portfolio_correlation_matrix, and portfolio_stress_test to validate improvement of risk/return metrics and diversification.
If further improvement needed, cycle through small incremental changes and re-evaluate portfolio with analytics tools until fully optimized to user goals and constraints.

tasks.description: Output final optimized portfolio and log changes versus original.

subtasks.description: Format and output the final optimized portfolio and summary of changes (added, removed, adjusted) in strict JSON format per specification.
